aspirations: Owning a modern home with new appliances
Greater equality and social justice for women and minorities
Enjoyment of leisure and emerging entertainment technologies

fashion.men: Men embraced a more relaxed style with wide-collared shirts, leisure suits made of polyester, and bell-bottom trousers. Platform shoes and longer hairstyles were also common, often accompanied by mustaches or sideburns.
fashion.women: Women's fashion saw a diverse range from flowing maxi dresses and bohemian looks to hot pants and form-fitting disco attire. Bell-bottoms, platform shoes, and synthetic fabrics were popular, reflecting a blend of casual comfort and glamorous trends.

failed_products.name: Quadraphonic Sound
failed_products.why_failed: Expensive, complex setup, lack of standardized formats, and limited content hindered widespread adoption by consumers.
failed_products.modern_gap: No, the desire for immersive audio is now filled by surround sound and object-based audio technologies like Dolby Atmos.

failed_products.name: 8-Track Tapes
failed_products.why_failed: Prone to jamming, inferior sound quality compared to cassettes and vinyl, and the inability to easily skip tracks led to their decline.
failed_products.modern_gap: No, convenient and portable music consumption is now filled by digital streaming services and improved physical formats.

failed_products.name: AMC Pacer
failed_products.why_failed: Marketed as the first wide small car for safety and interior space, the Pacer was designed around a rotary engine that never arrived. The backup inline-6 made it heavy and fuel-thirsty — exactly wrong for the 1973 oil crisis. Sales collapsed by 1978.
failed_products.modern_gap: The compact car with a genuinely spacious interior is now served by modern subcompact crossovers, but an affordable, fun, distinctively styled city car remains elusive.

ebay_hot_now: Mid-Century Modern Furniture (especially those with 70s aesthetics)
ebay_sleepers: Forgotten Vinyl Albums (obscure genres or artists before widespread reissues)

character_voice.worldview: They view the world with a mix of post-counterculture idealism and a growing cynicism about institutions, valuing authenticity and questioning authority amidst economic shifts. They likely prioritize personal experience and community over traditional structures.
character_voice.speech_patterns: Uses contemporary slang freely, often with a relaxed and informal tone, sometimes employing rhetorical questions to engage the listener.
taboo_topics: Questioning traditional gender roles in very conservative settings

story_accuracy: Characters using cell phones or widespread internet (neither existed or were accessible)
Portraying disco as the sole or dominant music genre for all social groups throughout the entire decade
Everyone owning a VCR or home computer early in the decade; these were rare and expensive until the very late 70s
